title: cyperus tetracarpus
intro: Cyperus tetracarpus, also known as the four-fruited flatsedge, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyperus tetracarpus include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Cyperus tetracarpus can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
